prompt: A high-end studio editorial portrait, half-body framing, featuring a {argument name="subject gender" default="woman"} in her mid-30s to early 40s with a naturally fit build. She stands facing the camera in a relaxed, confident pose with both hands tucked into her pants pockets, shoulders soft, posture upright, and a calm neutral self-assured expression. She has shoulder-length to slightly longer dark brown wavy hair with a natural side part and loose volume. She wears 3 visible clothing pieces: an olive green lightweight casual jacket with a slightly worn cotton texture, zip front and a single chest flap pocket; a plain dark charcoal or black crew-neck t-shirt underneath; and dark fitted pants with a black belt and simple square buckle. Shot at eye level with an 85mm portrait lens, shallow depth of field around f/2.8, keeping the subject crisp and detailed while the background falls softly out of focus. Use professional studio lighting with 3 clear light components: 1 softbox key light from the front, 1 subtle fill light to soften shadows, and 1 gentle rim light from behind to separate the hair and shoulders from the backdrop. Background is a seamless clean studio backdrop with a warm beige-to-taupe neutral gradient, smooth and distraction-free. The overall image should feel highly realistic, polished, and modern, like an understated fashion campaign or lifestyle magazine portrait. Natural balanced color grading, realistic skin tones, ultra-detailed fabric texture and hair strands, no noise, no motion blur, no stylization, no cartoon elements, no anatomical distortions, 8K quality.
translatedPrompt: 一张高端摄影棚时尚杂志风格肖像，半身构图，主角为一位 {argument name="subject gender" default="女性"}，年龄在 30 岁中期至 40 岁出头，身材匀称。她面对镜头，姿态放松自信，双手插在裤兜里，双肩自然下垂，体态挺拔，表情平静、中性且充满自信。她留着齐肩或稍长的深棕色波浪卷发，自然侧分，发量蓬松。身着 3 件可见服饰：一件橄榄绿色轻便休闲夹克，带有轻微磨损的棉质纹理，前襟拉链，胸前有一个翻盖口袋；内搭一件纯色深炭灰色或黑色圆领 T 恤；下身穿着深色修身长裤，配有黑色腰带和简约方形扣。采用 85mm 人像镜头平视拍摄，光圈 f/2.8 营造浅景深，使主体清晰细腻，背景柔和虚化。使用专业摄影棚布光，包含 3 种明确的光源：1 个正面柔光箱主光，1 个柔和阴影的补光灯，以及 1 个从后方照射的轻微轮廓光，以勾勒发丝和肩部轮廓，使其与背景分离。背景为无缝纯净摄影棚背景，呈现暖米色至灰褐色的中性渐变，平滑且无干扰。整体图像应具有高度的真实感、精致感和现代感，如同低调的时尚广告或生活方式杂志肖像。色彩分级自然平衡，肤色真实，织物纹理和发丝细节丰富，无噪点，无运动模糊，无风格化处理，无卡通元素，无解剖结构畸变，8K 画质。

breakdown.creativeCore: 橄榄绿夹克时尚杂志风格肖像：此提示词可生成逼真的半身时尚摄影肖像，采用低调休闲的造型，适用于杂志头像、生活方式广告及专业肖像对比。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, editorial, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: studio lighting, rim light, shallow depth, depth of field, lens, camera]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
